name: AgentOps Mock Runtime Contracts Canary
description: Offline public canary for deterministic mock runtime coverage and schema/docs contracts.

cases.title: temporary mock suite records mock runtime
cases.objective: Verify deterministic eval runs can execute a mock-runtime suite and record runtime.name=mock.

inputs.shell: tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; printf 'mock fixture\n' > "$tmp/fixture.txt"; python3 -c 'import json, sys; suite={"schema_version":1,"id":"tmp.mock-runtime","name":"Temporary mock runtime","domain":"runtime","visibility":"public_canary","tier":"deterministic","allowed_runtimes":["mock"],"scoring":{"aggregate_threshold":1,"dimensions":[{"name":"correctness","weight":1,"threshold":1}]},"baseline_policy":{"mode":"none"},"cases":[{"id":"mock-artifact","title":"mock artifact","kind":"artifact_check","objective":"mock runtime inference","runtime":"mock","expectations":[{"type":"artifact_contains","target":"fixture.txt","value":"mock fixture"}],"critical":True}]}; json.dump(suite, open(sys.argv[1],"w"))' "$tmp/mock-suite.json"; (cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go run ./cmd/ao eval run "$tmp/mock-suite.json" --out "$tmp/run.json" >/dev/null); python3 -c 'import json, sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["runtime"]["name"] == "mock"; assert data["runtime"]["attempts"] == 1; assert data["status"] == "pass"; assert data["case_results"][0]["status"] == "pass"' "$tmp/run.json"

cases.title: eval suite schema allows mock runtime
cases.objective: Keep the deterministic mock runtime represented in the eval suite schema.

cases.title: eval environment documents mocked runtime io
cases.objective: Keep the headless tier contract tied to mocked runtime I/O.

expectations.value: Local Claude/Codex CLI inventory or mocked runtime I/O
